creator: aryeh.friedman@gmail.com
text:
When building OoO-3 (or any version for that matter but this PR specifically refers to 3) the build fails to find libxml

Build output:

------------------------------
Making: ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib/libwpftfi.so
c++ -Wl,-z,combreloc -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN:$ORIGIN/../ure-link/lib' -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--version-script ../unxfbsdi.pro/misc/wpft_wpftfi.map -L../unxfbsdi.pro/lib -L../lib -L/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/BEA300_m2/solenv/unxfbsdi/lib -L/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/BEA300_m2/solver/300/unxfbsdi.pro/lib -L/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/BEA300_m2/solenv/unxfbsdi/lib -L/usr/local/jdk1.5.0/lib -L/usr/local/jdk1.5.0/jre/lib/i386 -L/usr/local/jdk1.5.0/jre/lib/i386/client -L/usr/local/jdk1.5.0/jre/lib/i386/native_threads -L/usr/local/lib ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/wpft_dflt_version.o -o ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib/libwpftfi.so ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/WPXSvStream.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/DocumentElement.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/FontStyle.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/ListStyle.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/DocumentHandler.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/PageSpan.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/SectionStyle.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/TableStyle.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/TextRunStyle.o ../unxfbsdi.pro/slo/DocumentCollector.

rm -f ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib/check_libwpftfi.so
mv ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib/libwpftfi.so ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib/check_libwpftfi.so
/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/BEA300_m2/solenv/bin/checkdll.sh -L../unxfbsdi.pro/lib -L/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/BEA300_m2/solver/300/unxfbsdi.pro/lib  ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib/check_libwpftfi.so
